// Rotate through platforms daily
const startDate = new Date('2026-04-22');
const today = new Date();
const dayNumber = Math.floor((today - startDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) + 1;
const dayOfWeek = ((dayNumber - 1) % 7) + 1;

const campaigns = {
  1: {
    platform: 'hackernews',
    title: 'Show HN: ProofKit – Social proof notifications for $9/mo (Proof.com alternative)',
    url: 'https://news.ycombinator.com/submit',
    content: `Proof.com charges $29/mo for a popup that says "someone just purchased."
The technology is trivial. The pricing isn't.

So I built the same thing for $9/mo, plus testimonial collection built in.

- One-line JavaScript embed
- Animated social proof notifications  
- Testimonial collection via shareable link
- Public testimonial wall
- Free tier (5 testimonials, no card required)

Why $9/mo? Because small businesses shouldn't pay enterprise prices for a popup widget.

Would love feedback from HN — what would make you actually use this?`,
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  },
  2: {
    platform: 'producthunt',
    title: 'Social proof notifications + testimonials for 70% less',
    url: 'https://www.producthunt.com/posts/new',
    content: `Hey PH! 👋

I was frustrated paying $29/mo for Proof.com to show "someone just bought" popups.
The widget is maybe 200 lines of JavaScript. The pricing is insane.

So I built ProofKit:
- Same social proof notifications
- Testimonial collection built in (others charge separately)
- $9/mo instead of $29

Would love your feedback. What feature would make you switch?`,
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  },
  3: {
    platform: 'reddit',
    subreddit: 'SaaS',
    title: 'I built a Proof.com alternative for $9/mo — roast my pricing',
    content: `Proof.com makes $250K/mo showing "someone just purchased" popups.
I built the same thing + testimonial collection for $9/mo.

Free tier available: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/

Honest question: is $9/mo too cheap? Should I charge more?
Or is the market too crowded to bother?

Roast away.`,
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  },
  4: {
    platform: 'reddit',
    subreddit: 'Entrepreneur',
    title: 'The $9 social proof tool that replaces Proof.com + Senja',
    content: `Every landing page needs social proof. Every business needs testimonials.
Existing tools charge $25-29/mo for each.

I built ProofKit — both in one tool for $9/mo.

What it does:
1. Shows "Sarah just purchased" notifications on your site
2. Collects testimonials via a shareable link
3. Displays them on a public wall
4. One-line embed, works on any site

Free tier included. Would love feedback from fellow entrepreneurs.`,
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  },
  5: {
    platform: 'reddit',
    subreddit: 'webdev',
    title: 'Open-sourced: social proof notification widget in React',
    content: `Built a social proof + testimonial widget as a single-page React app.
Deploys to GitHub Pages for free. No server needed.

Tech: React 19 + Vite + localStorage (upgrade to Supabase for production)

Source: https://github.com/factspark23-hash/proofkit
Live: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/

Feedback welcome on the code/architecture.`,
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  },
  6: {
    platform: 'twitter',
    tweets: [
      'Proof.com makes $250K/mo showing "someone just bought" popups.\n\nThe technology is trivial. The pricing isn\'t.\n\nSo I built the same thing for $9/mo.\n\nHere\'s how 👇',
      'One line of code. Animated notifications. Custom branding.\n\nPlus: testimonial collection built in. Proof.com charges extra for that.',
      'Why $9/mo?\n\nSmall businesses can\'t justify $29/mo for a popup widget.\nThe infra cost is near zero.\nI\'d rather have 1,000 happy customers at $9 than 100 at $29.',
      'Live now: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/\n\nFree tier: 5 testimonials + social proof. No card required.\n\nIf you run a SaaS or landing page — try it. Takes 3 minutes.'
    ],
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  },
  7: {
    platform: 'reddit',
    subreddit: 'smallbusiness',
    title: 'Free social proof tool for small business websites',
    content: `If you have a website, you need social proof — those "someone just purchased" notifications that build trust.

Most tools cost $25-30/month, which is crazy for a small business.

I built a free alternative: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/

Free tier includes:
- Social proof notifications
- Testimonial collection (send a link to happy customers)
- Public testimonial wall
- One-line embed for any website

Paid plan is $9/mo if you need more than 5 testimonials.

Feedback welcome!`,
    link: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/'
  }
};

const campaign = campaigns[dayOfWeek];

return [{
  json: {
    dayNumber,
    dayOfWeek,
    ...campaign
  }
}];
